value.reason: The cited page is about the "Antigravity Agent" — a managed agent feature of the Gemini API. It does not document prompt/context caching (reusing repeated prompt content to reduce cost and latency). While the page does briefly mention "context compaction" (automatic compaction at ~135k tokens for long-running sessions), that is an adjacent/different capability explicitly listed as distinct. There is no content on this page about configuring a cache for repeated prompt content, cache TTLs, cached token pricing, or any of the core mechanics of Google's Context Caching feature. The cell label ("Context Caching") and its description are therefore not supported by this page.
